name: handoff-note-pt-001
description: Canonical handoff-note draft focused on Patient A's spiking fever. Editable textarea + Send / Edit / Discard actions.

data.title: Night-shift handoff (draft)
data.subtitle: Focus: Patient A
data.body:
NIGHT-SHIFT HANDOFF — 2026-05-29 14:00 UTC
Focus patient: Patient A · Room 304-A

Primary issue: Post-op hip replacement — spiking fever
Attending: Dr. Okafor
Allergies: Penicillin

Active concerns:
  - [HIGH] Temp trending up — 38.4C
      Three consecutive readings >38.0C since 06:00. Cultures pending.
  - [MEDIUM] Wound site warm to touch
      Noted on 10:00 rounds. Surgical team paged.

Active orders:
  - Acetaminophen 650 mg PO q6h PRN (Pain / fever)
  - Enoxaparin 40 mg SC daily (DVT prophylaxis)
  - Cefazolin 1 g IV q8h (Surgical prophylaxis)

Plan: continue current orders. Reassess at 22:00 rounds. Page surgical team if temp >38.5C or O2 sat drops <94%.
